title: taraxacum recessum
intro: Taraxacum recessum, also known as the Alpine Dandelion, is a subspecies of the Taraxacum officinale complex, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum recessum include its ability to act as a diuretic and its potential anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating conditions such as arthritis and urinary tract infections. The health benefits of consuming Taraxacum recessum include its high content of vitamins A, C, and K, as well as its ability to support liver function and aid in digestion. Taraxacum recessum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
